title: polypodium stewartii
intro: Polypodium stewartii, also known as Polypodium vulgare, is a type of fern species that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polypodium stewartii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Polypodium stewartii is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to treat various health issues.
